rules.description: Everyone with a real order starts at 0% off.

VIPs get 15%. Highest priority, so it is evaluated first. Evaluate this set with EvaluationOptions.StopOnFirstMatch = true so the highest-priority matching rule wins and evaluation stops (this example's golden fixture does exactly that). Without StopOnFirstMatch, every matching rule fires and the lowest-priority one overwrites the shared Discount output last.
